# `e-signature` — e-signature templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 2

Phishing templates impersonating electronic signature platforms

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DocuSign NDA Signature Request | [`docusign_signature.html`](docusign_signature.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 40-60% |
| Adobe Acrobat Sign Employment Amendment | [`adobe_sign.html`](adobe_sign.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% |

## Template details

### DocuSign NDA Signature Request

- **File:** [`docusign_signature.html`](docusign_signature.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/esignature_education.html`](education/esignature_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Please DocuSign: Mutual_NDA_2024.pdf
  - Action Required: Document awaiting your signature
  - DocuSign: Legal & Compliance Team sent you a document
- **Operator notes:** NDA context works across industries. 48-hour expiry adds urgency without seeming implausible.

### Adobe Acrobat Sign Employment Amendment

- **File:** [`adobe_sign.html`](adobe_sign.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/esignature_education.html`](education/esignature_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Adobe Sign: Signature required — Employment Agreement
  - Action required: Please sign your document
  - HR has sent you a document via Adobe Acrobat Sign
- **Operator notes:** HR context creates authority. Employment amendment is plausible for any employee.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
